description: The Delhi–Agra tour offers a powerful journey through India’s rich history, culture and monumental brilliance. Delhi welcomes you with a mix of ancient forts, royal Mughal architecture and modern city life — from India Gate and Red Fort to bustling markets and iconic street food lanes. Agra, home to the world-famous Taj Mahal, brings you face-to-face with one of the greatest wonders of the world — a symbol of love, carved in pure white marble. Together, these two cities offer an unforgettable travel experience filled with heritage, stories of emperors, vibrant culture and UNESCO sites. Whether it’s witnessing the Taj Mahal’s sunrise glow or exploring Delhi’s historic landmarks, this trip gives you a beautiful window into India’s glorious past.
cost_includes:
3 star premium hotel stay 
All transfers and sightseeing by AC Vehicle. 
All Meals 
Toll Tax. 
Parking. 
Driver Allowance. 
Travel Goodies 
24 x 7 On tour Assistance Experience tour Manager all entry ticket
cost_excludes:
Any meals other than those mentioned above inclusion 		
Airfare / Train Ticket 		
GST 5% 		
All monument entry Fees  		
Any portage at airports and hotels, tips, insurance, wine, mineral water, telephone charges, and all items of personal nature. 		
Any services not specifically mentioned in the inclusions. 		
Entrance fees to Monuments & other sight-seeing points. 		
Expenses caused by factors beyond our control like rail and flight delays, roadblocks, vehicle malfunctions, political disturbances etc.                   
Anything Not mentioned in inclusions.

faqs.title: 1) What is the best time to visit Delhi & Agra?
faqs.content: October to March — weather is pleasant for sightseeing.

faqs.title: 2) Is Taj Mahal entry included?
faqs.content: Entry is optional — can be included based on package selection.

faqs.title: 3) What are the must-visit places?
faqs.content:
Delhi: India Gate, Red Fort, Qutub Minar, Lotus Temple, Akshardham, Chandni Chowk
Agra: Taj Mahal, Agra Fort, Mehtab Bagh

faqs.title: 4) Is sunrise Taj Mahal visit possible?
faqs.content: Yes — it can be arranged. Many travellers prefer the early morning view.

faqs.title: 5) What should we carry?
faqs.content: Comfortable footwear, sunscreen, hat/cap, sunglasses and water bottle.
